curl GET status: https://hayescanon.org -> 200; https://modernminuteman.net -> 200; https://capablefew.com -> 200.

assertions.reason: Interventions section includes Skinner Layne and Noah (The Meta Father) with specific factual outcomes and no inflated language observed.

assertions.reason: Programs section lists Exosphere, Volta, and Modern Minuteman with brief descriptions.
evidence: Content check: Exosphere (multi-week to two-month intensives), Volta (weekend retreat format), Modern Minuteman (structured cohort programs).

assertions.reason: Tools section lists sd-core, spikes.sh, beats, and werk-cli with brief descriptions; sd-core appears as a tool item and not as a dedicated top-level section.
evidence: Content check: sd-core (Structural dynamics framework), spikes.sh (Rapid prototyping), beats (Knowledge and memory system), werk-cli (Workspace management).
